modules.description: Brake control - ABS, traction control, stability control

modules.description: Active suspension control - adaptive dampening

modules.description: Driver door functions - locks, windows, mirrors

modules.description: Passenger door functions - locks, windows, mirrors

modules.name: Electric Power Steering
modules.description: Power steering control - assist level, returnability

modules.description: Steering column functions - tilt, telescope, lock

modules.name: Transfer Case Control Module
modules.description: 4WD/AWD control - transfer case, differential locks

modules.description: Tire pressure monitoring - sensors, alerts

modules.name: Security Gateway Module

modules.name: Adaptive Cruise Control

modules.name: Radio / Infotainment

send_solution.description: Send calculated solution to unlock EEPROM write

write_eeprom.prerequisite: Must send valid solution via 0x2C first

0x31.name: RoutineControl
0x31.notes: May be required after VIN write
